agentAbility.name: Napalm in the Morning
agentAbility.description: Calls in an F-4 Phantom and places a napalm strike from an aerial targeting view.

agentTrait.name: Relentless
agentTrait.description: Protects the vehicle from being destroyed with a single shot, provided it has sufficient HP.

primaryAttack.name: Single Shot
primaryAttack.description: Requires reload after each shot, most accurate when stationary.

tankAbilities.name: Suppressive Fire
tankAbilities.description: Dual .50 cal machine guns that automatically target enemies and Slow them under sustained fire.

tankAbilities.name: Charge
tankAbilities.description: Plows forward, pushes enemies aside, and reduces ramming damage taken.
